info.title: Admin Operations
info.description: The Admin Operations API allows for management of the SCM account using an admin credential

instance.description: Each instance of Sectigo's services has a unique value.

tags.name: Template Administrators
tags.description: Provides API for template administrators management. IdP Templates are used for automatic creation of IdP Administrators during login via Identity Provider. The IdP attribute mapping controls which template an admin will be linked to.

tags.name: SSL certificates
tags.description:
Used to perform operations on SSL certificates.
SSL certificates are identified by an ID field, usually known as sslId in this API.

tags.name: Device certificates
tags.description: Used to perform operations on device certificates.

tags.name: Administrators
tags.description: Provides API for administrator users management. Supported administrator types: STANDARD, API, IDP, SAS.

tags.name: Network Discovery Tasks
tags.description: Manage network discovery tasks

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: View and manage notifications

tags.name: Assignment rules
tags.description: View and manage discovery assignment rules

tags.name: Organizations
tags.description: View and manage organizations

tags.name: Domain Control Validation
tags.description: Any domain added to SCM must pass Domain Control Validation (DCV) before public certificates can be issued to it. DCV is a procedure of validation of the applicant’s control of the domain which needs to appear in the subject of the certificate.

tags.name: Persons
tags.description: View and manage persons

tags.name: Certificate Buckets
tags.description: View and manage certificate buckets

tags.name: Sectigo Public ACME accounts
tags.description: View and manage Sectigo Public ACME accounts

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: View reports

tags.name: Client Certificates
tags.description: Used to perform operations on client certificates

tags.name: Sectigo Public ACME Servers

tags.name: Operations
tags.description: View and manage certificate discovery operations

tags.name: MS AD Discovery Tasks
tags.description: View and manage MS AD discovery tasks

tags.name: Network Agents
tags.description: Used to perform operations on Network Agents.

tags.name: Domains
tags.description: Provides API for domains management.

tags.name: Custom Fields
tags.description: View and manage custom fields.

tags.name: Azure Accounts

get.description: Query Public ACME account's domains available according to filtering parameters supplied

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: SCM internal ID of ACME account whose domains are requested

schema.description: The first position (entry) to return from the results of the query
The RegExp that can be used as a filter to get ACME account domains whose names match against. Special characters should be URL-encoded e.g. \. ⇒ %5C%2E

Number of days(from current date) that is used as a filter to get ACME account’s domains whose 'validUntil' field(date) falls within the specifies time period, so during which ACME account’s domain validation will be or already has(in case of negative number) expired. Zero number of days means today, negative number of days means before today, positive number of days means after today.

Number of days(from current date) that is used as a filter to get ACME account’s domains whose 'stickyUntil' field(date) falls within the specifies time period, so during which ACME account domain validation sticky will be or already has(in case of negative number) expired. Zero number of days means today, negative number of days means before today, positive number of days means after today.

200.description: List of Public ACME account's domains with details

X-Total-Count.description: Total count of filtered ACME account’s domains existing on Sectigo public CA side

404.description: Entity not found. Response contains error code and error description.

post.description: Adds list of given domains to Public ACME account with given id

200.description: List of names for domains which were not added

404.description: Entity not found. Response contains error code and error description.

delete.description: Remove list of given domains from Public ACME account with given id

200.description: List of names for domains which were not removed

404.description: Entity not found. Response contains error code and error description.

schema.description: The first position (entry) to return from the results of the query
The whole or part of name of server discovered by Network agent to match against to anywhere in the server name with insensitive case compare when counting.
To match against a Vendor of server discovered by Network agent.
To match against a State of server discovered by Network agent.

200.description: An array of servers discovered by network agent

X-Total-Count.description: Count of servers discovered by network agent.

404.description: Entity not found. Response contains error code and error description.

requestBody.description: Request object to add server to Network agent.

get.description: Get detailed information about IdP template.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of IdP admin template being requested

put.description: Update IdP Template. Fields that are not changed can be omitted in request. Please note that requested changes (except name) are automatically applied to all IdP admins assigned to this template. In order to get a list of administrators that are currently assigned to this template, please use "List administrators" method from the "Administrators Management" API with filter by "templateId" parameter.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of IdP admin template being updated

404.description: Entity not found. Response contains error code and error description.

delete.description: Delete IdP template. By default, all related administrators will be deleted automatically with the template. It is also possible to unlink all related administrators from this template. In order to get a list of administrators that are currently assigned to this template, please use "List administrators" method from the "Administrators" API with filter by "templateId" parameter.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of IdP template being deleted

parameters.name: relatedAdminsAction
parameters.description: Option that specify required action for the related IdP admins that were created based on this template and still assigned to it. Default value is 'unlink', which means that assigned admins will be unlinked from this template and will no longer be managed by it. When 'delete' action is specified, then related admins will be deleted together with this template.

parameters.name: replacingRequesterId
parameters.description: Optional, specifies ID of the client administrator to be assigned as certificate requester instead of those being deleted. If omitted, currently assigned requesters are retained. Has no effect if 'unlink' or no value is passed to 'relatedAdminsAction' request parameter. The replacing requester should have type other than IdP Template and have no parent template or have parent template whose Id differs from Id of the template being deleted. Use respective list API method with necessary filtering options to get suitable client administrators.

204.description: No content

404.description: Entity not found. Response contains error code and error description.

get.summary: Download Private Key From Private Key Agent
get.description: Generation of a link to download private key from Private Key Agent.

parameters.name: sslId
parameters.description: SSL ID for which the link will be generated

parameters.name: formatType
parameters.description:
Parameter to specify download format: key only or entire certificate.
Possible values:
'**key**' - for Private Key, Base64 encoded,
'**p12**' - for PKCS#12, Base64 encoded,
'**p12aes**' - for Certificate and Private Key, PKCS#12,
'**jks**' - for Certificate and Private Key, Java Key Store,
'**pem**' - for Certificate and Private Key, Encrypted PEM

get.description: Delivering the newly issued Client certificate from CA to the administrator for download.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description:
Format type for certificate. Allowed values:
'*x509*' - for Certificate (w/ chain), PEM encoded,
'*x509CO*' - for Certificate only, PEM encoded,
'*base64*' - for PKCS#7, PEM encoded,
'*bin*' - for PKCS#7,
'*x509IO*' - for Root/Intermediate(s) only, PEM encoded,
'*x509IOR*' - for Intermediate(s)/Root only, PEM encoded,
'*pem*' - for Certificate (w/ chain), PEM encoded,
'*pemco*' - for Certificate only, PEM encoded,
'*pemia*' - for Certificate (w/ issuer after), PEM encoded,
'*x509R*' - for Certificate (w/ chain), PEM encoded,
'*pkcs12*' - for Certificate and Private key, PKCS#12

get.description: Delivering the newly issued SSL Certificate from CA to the administrator for download.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description:
Format type for certificate. Allowed values:
'*x509*' - for Certificate (w/ chain), PEM encoded,
'*x509CO*' - for Certificate only, PEM encoded,
'*base64*' - for PKCS#7, PEM encoded,
'*bin*' - for PKCS#7,
'*x509IO*' - for Root/Intermediate(s) only, PEM encoded,
'*x509IOR*' - for Intermediate(s)/Root only, PEM encoded,
'*pem*' - for Certificate (w/ chain), PEM encoded,
'*pemco*' - for Certificate only, PEM encoded,
'*pemia*' - for Certificate (w/ issuer after), PEM encoded,
'*x509R*' - for Certificate (w/ chain), PEM encoded,
'*pkcs12*' - for Certificate and Private key, PKCS#12

notRemovedDomains.description: Domains not removed from the ACME account upon update operation

items.description: Domains not removed from the ACME account upon update operation

active.description: Denotes either server active or not.

orderNumber.description: Obsolete parameter for the order identifier under which the certificate request has been processed. BackendCertId should be used instead.

mandatories.description: List of access methods for which this field is mandatory

certType.description: Certificate type. Default value is SSL for backward compatibility.

orgJoiState.description: EV organization state or province of incorporation

orgJoiLocality.description: EV organization jurisdiction of incorporation city or town

validUntil.description: ACME account domain validation until date in ISO-8601 format

stickyUntil.description: ACME account domain validation sticky until date in ISO-8601 format

ovAnchorOrderNumber.description: ACME account validated domain OV order number from Sectigo public CA (deprecated, see 'ovAnchorID')

evAnchorOrderNumber.description: ACME account validated domain EV order number from Sectigo public CA (deprecated, see 'evAnchorID')

ovAnchorID.description: ACME account validated domain OV anchor certificate ID from Sectigo public CA

evAnchorID.description: ACME account validated domain EV anchor certificate ID from Sectigo public CA

clientSecret.description: REST Authentication Client secret. The Client Secret is displayed once (now) for added security. Please copy it and keep it somewhere safe and accessible. Note, you’ll be able to reset your Client Secret if needed.

dcvExpiration.description: DCV expiration date. This field is shown only if DCV is enabled for customer.

delegations.description: List of domain delegations, filtered by admin roles.

terms.description: Terms (in days) available for the Certificate Profile

items.description: Terms (in days) available for the Certificate Profile

additionalProperties.description: Key types available for the Certificate Profile

items.description: Key types available for the Certificate Profile

keyTypes.description: Key types available for the Certificate Profile

term.description: Terms (in days) available for the Certificate Profile

ku.description: Key Usages available for the Certificate Profile

items.description: Key Usages available for the Certificate Profile

eku.description: Extended Key Usages available for the Certificate Profile

items.description: Extended Key Usages available for the Certificate Profile

message.description: Short message containing accompanying information for certificate decline action

active.description: Required domain state. Set 'false' if you want to create domain in suspended state.

certBucketId.description: Id of the bucket to which this task will be applied

url.description: URL to the validation txt file in the "/.well-known/pki-validation" directory of the HTTP server.

firstLine.description: Validation txt file content: first line.

secondLine.description: Validation txt file content: second line.

clientId.description: REST Authentication Client id. It will be shown all the time if authentication on a bucket is enabled, and will not be shown if authentication is disabled.

password.description: Admin password. Applied only for admin types: STANDARD, API.

idpPersonId.description: Person Identifier (EPPN) in scope of Identity Provider.

activeStatus.description: Admin status. Possible values: ACTIVE, SUSPENDED.

orgId.description: Applicable for RAO, DRAO roles only. Specify the context of the Organization ID (RAO) or Department ID (DRAO) this role is related to.

name.description: Name of an enabled custom field.

customFields.description: Custom fields to be applied to requested certificate. Must contain mandatory custom fields.

optionalFields.description: Optional fields to be applied to requested certificate

deviceCertId.description: Unique ID for certificate. This ID should be used for certificate operations.

DepartmentBasicInfo.description: List of departments with basic details

departments.description: List of departments with basic details

firstName.description: Person first name. Constraint: firstName must not be empty, firstName + middleName + lastName must be in range of 1 to 64 characters

middleName.description: Person middle name. Constraint: firstName + middleName + lastName must be in range of 1 to 64 characters

lastName.description: Person last name. Constraint: lastName must not be empty, firstName + middleName + lastName must be in range of 1 to 64 characters

customFields.description: Custom fields to be applied to requested certificate

commonName.description: Person's common name, if omitted will be constructed from Person's full name

orgDelegations.description: Delegated organization IDs. Should be empty for GLOBAL_FOR_CUSTOMER delegation mode.

items.description: Delegated organization IDs. Should be empty for GLOBAL_FOR_CUSTOMER delegation mode.

name.description: MS Agent name. Must be not blank.

adDomainsList.description: List of domains to include or exclude from discovery. Comma separated

adDomainsListRestricted.description: If true - domains from list will be excluded from discovery. If false - only specified domains will be included to discovery

defaultEnrollmentOrgId.description: Default Organization/Department to enroll certificates by MS Agent

installationToken.description: The token which can be used during MS Agent installation

certBucketId.description: Id of the bucket to which this task will be applied

AzureKeyVault.description:
Azure Key Vault configuration: azureAccountId and vaultKey
(required if keyGenerationMethod is AZURE_KEY_VAULT)

externalRequester.description: External Requester. Acceptable format: 'email@domain.com' or 'email1@domain.com, email2@domain.com'

customFields.description: Custom fields to be applied to requested certificate. Must contain mandatory custom fields.

passPhrase.description: Password to protect PKCS#12 certificate(in case of Private Key agent key generation mode).

keyParam.description:
Keypair key size (for RSA) or curve name (for EC).
Applied only in case keypair algorithm is specified.

reuseKey.description: Reuse keypair if exists. For AZURE_KEY_VAULT only

exportableKey.description: Exportable keypair(not possible if the key is on HSM). For AZURE_KEY_VAULT only

hsmOnly.description: Generate keypair on HSM. Requires enterprise Azure Vault. For AZURE_KEY_VAULT only

items.description: Allowed values that IdP attribute value should match in whole or in part, depending of specified "matchType". Note: in case of collection attribute, rule is applied on its items - if at least one meets the rule, it will be considered as matched.

privileges.description: Privileges that will be assigned to the admin, automatically created by this template.

credentials.description: Roles that will be assigned to the admin, automatically created by this template.

idpMappingRules.description: Mapping rules that should be applied in order to check whether user’s IdP attributes match the template. Should always include "groups" attribute.

deleted.description: IdP template deletion date (for deleted templates only).

terms.description: Terms (in days) available for the Certificate Profile

items.description: Terms (in days) available for the Certificate Profile

additionalProperties.description: Key types available for the Certificate Profile

items.description: Key types available for the Certificate Profile

keyTypes.description: Key types available for the Certificate Profile

ApiCertType.description: Information about Certificate Profile this certificate was enrolled from

message.description: Short message containing accompanying information for certificate approval action

emails.description: List of email addresses for Email DCV method.

name.description: Name of server discovered by Network agent. Must be not blank.

vendor.description: Vendor of server discovered by Network agent

ip.description: Hostname or IP address of server that's creating as one discovered by Network agent. Required for a remote server.

port.description:
Port number on server discovered by Network agent.
Required for a remote server and for all except 'Microsoft IIS 7.x' vendors.

path.description:
Path to root directory(in case of 'Apache Tomcat 7.x, 9.x' vendor)
or to the 'apachectl' executable(in case of 'Apache 2.x' vendor)
of server discovered by Network agent. Can be specified only for listed vendors. Optional

altPathForCert.description:
Alternative path to a directory where server discovered by Network agent stores certificates.
Can be specified for a remote server and for 'Apache 2.x' vendor only. Optional.

privateKeyPath.description:
Path to a directory where Network agent stores private key to authenticate on discovered server.
Can be specified for a remote server and for 'Apache 2.x' and 'Apache Tomcat 7.x, 9.x' vendors only.
Must be used in conjunction with 'passPhrase' but not with 'username'/'password' parameters and not with 'storeName'/'storeCredId' parameters. Optional.

passPhrase.description:
Passphrase to gain access to keystore where Network agent preserves the private key to authenticate on discovered server.
Can be specified for a remote server and for 'Apache 2.x' and 'Apache Tomcat 7.x, 9.x' vendors only.
Used together with 'privateKeyPath' but not with 'username'/'password' parameters and not with 'storeName'/'storeCredId' parameters. Optional.

username.description:
Username(login) to gain access to server discovered by Network agent.
Can be specified for a remote server and for all vendors.
Must be used in conjunction with 'password' but not with 'privateKeyPath'/'passPhrase' parameters and not with 'storeName'/'storeCredId' parameters. Optional.

password.description:
Password for username to gain access to server discovered by Network agent.
Can be specified for a remote server and for all vendors.
Used together with 'username' but not with 'privateKeyPath'/'passPhrase' parameters and not with 'storeName'/'storeCredId' parameters. Optional.

storeName.description:
Store name to gain access to server discovered by Network agent.
Can be specified for a remote server and for 'Apache 2.x' and 'Apache Tomcat 7.x, 9.x' vendors only.
Must be used in conjunction with 'storeCredId' but not with 'username'/'password' parameters and not with 'privateKeyPath'/'passPhrase' parameters. Optional.

storeCredId.description:
Store credential ID to gain access to server discovered by Network agent.
Can be specified for a remote server and for 'Apache 2.x' and 'Apache Tomcat 7.x, 9.x' vendors only.
Must be used in conjunction with 'storeName' but not with 'username'/'password' parameters and not with 'privateKeyPath'/'passPhrase' parameters. Optional.

total.description: Count of certificate discovery operations found

reasonCode.description:
Revocation reason code to be put to CRL (Mozilla Root Store Policy 2.8 section 6.1.1)
Reason code (unspecified (0),
keyCompromise (1),
affiliationChanged (3),
superseded (4),
cessationOfOperation (5))

adDomainsList.description: List of domains to include or exclude from discovery. Comma separated

adDomainsListRestricted.description: If true - domains from list will be excluded from discovery. If false - only specified domains will be included to discovery

defaultEnrollmentOrgId.description: Default Organization/Department to enroll certificates by MS Agent

externalRequester.description: External Requester. Acceptable format: 'email@domain.com' or 'email1@domain.com, email2@domain.com'

customFields.description: Custom fields to be applied to requested certificate. Must contain mandatory custom fields.

privileges.description: Privileges that will be assigned to the admin, automatically created by this template.

credentials.description: Roles that will be assigned to the admin, automatically created by this template.

idpMappingRules.description: Mapping rules that should be applied in order to check whether user’s IdP attributes match the template. Should always include "groups" attribute.

active.description: Denotes either agent active or not.

installationToken.description: The token which can be used during an installation of Network agent at client's environment.

active.description: Denotes either agent active or not.

secretKey.description: New secret key used for Network agent lookup and authorization.

keystorePwd.description: New password for the local keystore where Network agent stores certificates and keys.

link.description: Link to download key or certificate from Private Key Controller

upn.description: Certificate AD entry user principal name

id.description: Private key id in azure vault

reasonCode.description:
Revocation reason code to be put to CRL (Mozilla Root Store Policy 2.8 section 6.1.1)
Reason code (unspecified (0),
keyCompromise (1),
affiliationChanged (3),
superseded (4),
cessationOfOperation (5))

reason.description: Short message explaining why certificate needs to be revoked

os.description: Operating system on host where Network agent installed

autoUpdate.description: Enabled or disabled Network agent auto update

localIp.description: IP addresses list Network agent installed on

lastActivity.description: Last Network agent activity timestamp. Optional.

installationToken.description:
The token which can be used during an installation of Network agent at client’s environment.
Provided for new Network agents only or those which were not connected to SCM yet. Optional.

secretKey.description: Secret key to authenticate Network agent on SCM

active.description: Denotes either agent active or not.

notAddedDomains.description: Domains not added to the ACME account upon update operation

items.description: Domains not added to the ACME account upon update operation

newPassword.description: New password for admin user. The value should comply with the customer's password policy.

id.description: Internal SCM identifier of Universal ACME account client

accountId.description: Universal ACME account client’s accountID. Note this identifier is concerning to the ACME client itself, but not to its parent Universal ACME account.

ipAddress.description: IP address of host from where the Universal ACME account’s client was last active

userAgent.description: Universal ACME account client’s user agent name

lastActivity.description: Date when Universal ACME account’s client was last active

contacts.description: Contact(s) concerning of ACME client operations

clientId.description: REST Authentication Client id. It will be shown all the time if authentication on a bucket is enabled, and will not be shown if authentication is disabled.

clientSecret.description: REST Authentication Client secret. It will be shown only once if you decide to enable authentication on the bucket, if it was disabled before.

daysBeforeExpiration.description: Days before expiration to start auto-renewal

approverAdminId.description: Approver Admin Id. Value -1 will set the approver admin to <None>

issuer.description: The subject of the issuing CA certificate

subjectAltNames.description: The subject alternative names of the issuing CA certificate

md5Hash.description: The MD5 fingerprint of CA certificate

sha1Hash.description: The SHA1 fingerprint of CA certificate

certTypeId.description: Profile id that this notification belongs to

enum: Client Admin Change Password by API

from.description:
The report contains Device certificates which date, defined by 'certificateDateAttribute' request field, is not earlier than this date.
ISO format, YYYY-MM-DD. Must be earlier than 'to' date.

to.description:
The report contains Device certificates which date, defined by 'certificateDateAttribute' request field, is not later than this date.
ISO format, YYYY-MM-DD. Must not be earlier than 'from' date.

organizationIds.description: Unique identifiers of the organizations. The report contains Device certificates associated with these organizations.

certificateStatus.description:
Status ID of Client certificates that are included in the report.
The values applicable to this type of report are:
[0 (Any), 1 (Requested),  2 (Issued), 3 (Revoked), 4 (Expired), 8 (Approved), 9 (Applied)].
Deprecated statuses: 10 (Downloaded), 7 (Awaiting Approval) - see 'Certificate Status Codes' section for details.

certificateDateAttribute.description:
Unique identifier of the date type.
The values applicable to this type of report are: [2(Revocation Date), 3(Expiration Date), 4(Request Date), 5(Issuance Date)]

serialNumberFormat.description:
Special format of a Serial Number, if required.
If the value specified is 'HEXWithLeadingZeros', then report contains certificate serial numbers in HEX format without leading zeros stripped.

id.description: An ID using which this certificate can be renewed or revoked through Enrollment form

city.description: An organization city which this certificate is associated with

state.description: An organization state which this certificate is associated with

country.description: An organization country which this certificate is associated with

orderNumber.description: The obsolete parameter for the order identifier under which the certificate request has been processed. backendCertId should be used instead

keyUsage.description: Key usage extensions define the purpose of the public key contained in a certificate

extendedKeyUsage.description: Extended key usage further refines key usage extensions

keyType.description: Key type. For example: RSA - 2048, EC - P-256.

id.description: An organization id which this action is associated with

name.description: An organization name which this action is associated with

installationToken.description: The token which can be used during MS Agent installation

autoUpdate.description: Enabled or disabled MS Agent auto update

localIp.description: IP addresses list Agent installed on

caProxyEnabled.description: Is MS Agent installed as MS CA or not

adDomainsList.description: List of domains to include or exclude from discovery

adDomainsListRestricted.description: If true domains from list will be excluded from discovery. If false - only specified domains will be included to discovery

defaultEnrollmentOrgId.description: Default Organization/Department to enroll certificates by MS Agent

id.description: ID of server discovered by Network agent

vendor.description: Vendor of server discovered by Network agent

name.description: Name of server discovered by Network agent

path.description: Path to root directory where server discovered by Network agent is installed.

status.description: The state of server discovered by Network agent

errorMessage.description: The error occurred when Network agent was executing a command intended for this discovered server.

ip.description: Hostname or IP of server discovered by Network agent

port.description: Port number on server discovered by Network agent

altPathForCert.description: Alternative path to a directory where server discovered by Network agent stores certificates.

username.description: Username(login) to gain access to server discovered by Network agent.

privateKeyPath.description: Path to a directory where Network agent stores private key to authenticate on discovered server.

storeName.description: Store name to gain access to server discovered by Network agent.

name.description: Name of server discovered by Network agent. Optional. Must be not blank if specified.

vendor.description: Vendor of server discovered by Network agent

ip.description: Hostname or IP address of server that's creating as one discovered by Network agent. Required for a remote server.

port.description:
Port number on server discovered by Network agent.
Required for a remote server and for all except 'Microsoft IIS 7.x' vendors.

path.description:
Path to root directory(in case of 'Apache Tomcat 7.x, 9.x' vendor)
or to the 'apachectl' executable(in case of 'Apache 2.x' vendor)
of server discovered by Network agent. Can be specified only for listed vendors. Optional

altPathForCert.description:
Alternative path to a directory where server discovered by Network agent stores certificates.
Can be specified for a remote server and for 'Apache 2.x' vendor only. Optional.

privateKeyPath.description:
Path to a directory where Network agent stores private key to authenticate on discovered server.
Can be specified for a remote server and for 'Apache 2.x' and 'Apache Tomcat 7.x, 9.x' vendors only.
Must be used in conjunction with 'passPhrase' but not with 'username'/'password' parameters and not with 'storeName'/'storeCredId' parameters. Optional.

passPhrase.description:
Passphrase to gain access to keystore where Network agent preserves the private key to authenticate on discovered server.
Can be specified for a remote server and for 'Apache 2.x' and 'Apache Tomcat 7.x, 9.x' vendors only.
Used together with 'privateKeyPath' but not with 'username'/'password' parameters and not with 'storeName'/'storeCredId' parameters. Optional.

username.description:
Username(login) to gain access to server discovered by Network agent.
Can be specified for a remote server and for all vendors.
Must be used in conjunction with 'password' but not with 'privateKeyPath'/'passPhrase' parameters and not with 'storeName'/'storeCredId' parameters. Optional.

password.description:
Password for username to gain access to server discovered by Network agent.
Can be specified for a remote server and for all vendors.
Used together with 'username' but not with 'privateKeyPath'/'passPhrase' parameters and not with 'storeName'/'storeCredId' parameters. Optional.

storeName.description:
Store name to gain access to server discovered by Network agent.
Can be specified for a remote server and for 'Apache 2.x' and 'Apache Tomcat 7.x, 9.x' vendors only.
Must be used in conjunction with 'storeCredId' but not with 'username'/'password' parameters and not with 'privateKeyPath'/'passPhrase' parameters. Optional.

storeCredId.description:
Store credential ID to gain access to server discovered by Network agent.
Can be specified for a remote server and for 'Apache 2.x' and 'Apache Tomcat 7.x, 9.x' vendors only.
Must be used in conjunction with 'storeName' but not with 'username'/'password' parameters and not with 'privateKeyPath'/'passPhrase' parameters. Optional.

reasonCode.description:
Revocation reason code to be put to CRL (Mozilla Root Store Policy 2.8 section 6.1.1)
Reason code (unspecified (0),
keyCompromise (1),
affiliationChanged (3),
superseded (4),
cessationOfOperation (5))

reason.description: Short message explaining why certificate needs to be revoked

schacHomeOrganization.description: Organization SCHAC code. (Deprecated, please use 'alias' instead).

sslCertsApiEnabled.description: Allow Web/REST API operations for SSL certificates of this organization/department.

clientCertsApiEnabled.description: Allow Web/REST API operations for Client certificates of this organization/department

organizationIdentifier.description: Organization Identifier according to the ETSI 319 412-1 standard

from.description:
Activity log includes the events that occurred from this date (ISO format, YYYY-MM-DD).
Filters the audit log records by 'created' date.

to.description:
Activity log includes the events that occurred not later than this date (ISO format, YYYY-MM-DD)
Filters the audit log records by 'created' date.

accessMethod.description: An access method used to perform the action

address.description: Source IP address of the action request

login.description: An admin login which this action is associated with

orderNumber.description: The obsolete parameter for the order identifier under which the client certificate request has been processed. backendCertId should be used instead

backendCertId.description: Client certificate ID in enrolling backend

orderNumber.description: The obsolete parameter for the order identifier under which the SSL certificate request has been processed. backendCertId should be used instead

backendCertId.description: SSL certificate ID in enrolling backend

from.description:
The report contains SSL certificates which date, defined by 'certificateDateAttribute' request field, is not earlier than this date.
ISO format, YYYY-MM-DD. Must be earlier than 'to' date.

to.description:
The report contains SSL certificates which date, defined by 'certificateDateAttribute' request field, is not later than this date.
ISO format, YYYY-MM-DD. Must not be earlier than 'from' date.

organizationIds.description: Unique identifiers of the organizations. The report contains SSL certificates associated with these organizations.

commonName.description: The report will contain only certs with Common Name pattern like this

externalRequester.description: The report will contain only certs with External Requester pattern like this (case sensitive)

certificateStatus.description:
Status ID of SSL certificates that are included in the report.
The values applicable to this type of report are:
[0(Any), 1(Requested), 2(Issued), 3(Revoked), 4(Expired)]. 11(External) - deprecated, see 'Certificate Status Codes' section for details.

certificateDateAttribute.description:
Unique identifier of the date type.
The values applicable to this type of report are:
[2 (Revocation Date), 3 (Expiration Date), 4 (Request Date), 5 (Issuance Date)]

certificateRequestSource.description:
The source a certificate has been requested from.
The values applicable to this type of report are:
0 (Enrollment Form), 1 (Client Admin), 2 (Web API), 3 (Discovery), 4 (Imported), 5 (SCEP), 7 (MS Agent), 9 (Bulk Request), 10 (ACME), 11 (EST), 12 (REST API)

serialNumberFormat.description:
Special format of a Serial Number, if required.
If the value specified is 'HEXWithLeadingZeros', then report contains certificate serial numbers in HEX format without leading zeros stripped.

includeIpAddresses.description: Include certificate IP locations. Significantly affects report generation time.

reports.description: Array of reported SSL certificates with details

id.description: An ID using which this certificate can be renewed or revoked through Enrollment form

orgId.description: An organization ID which this certificate is associated with

organizationName.description: An organization name which this certificate is associated with

orderNumber.description: The obsolete parameter for the order identifier under which the certificate request has been processed. backendCertId should be used instead

issuer.description: The subject of the issuing CA certificate

city.description: An organization city which this certificate is associated with

state.description: An organization state which this certificate is associated with

country.description: An organization country which this certificate is associated with

publicKeyType.description: Key type. For example: RSA - 2048, EC - P-256.

id.description: ID of node in server discovered by Network agent

alias.description: Name of node in server discovered by Network agent

name.description: Full name of node in server discovered by Network agent

protocol.description: Schema of protocol used to connect to node in server discovered by Network agent.

address.description: IP address of node in server discovered by Network agent

port.description: Port number listening by node in server discovered by Network agent

errorMessage.description: The error occurred when Network agent was executing a command intended for node in server discovered by Network agent

sslId.description: ID of entity of SSL certificate installed on server node and discovered by Network agent either from SSL connection or from server configuration

from.description:
The report contains Client certificates which date, defined by 'certificateDateAttribute' request field, is not earlier than this date.
ISO format, YYYY-MM-DD. Must be earlier than 'to' date.

to.description:
The report contains Client certificates which date, defined by 'certificateDateAttribute' request field, is not later than this date.
ISO format, YYYY-MM-DD. Must not be earlier than 'from' date.

organizationIds.description: Unique identifiers of the organizations. The report contains Client certificates associated with these organizations.

certificateStatus.description:
Status ID of Client certificates that are included in the report.
The values applicable to this type of report are:
[0(Any), 2(Enrolled), 3(Revoked), 4(Expired), 5(Enrolled - Pending Download), 6(Not Enrolled)].

2(Enrolled) - Former 'Enrolled - Downloaded'. Use with "certificateDateAttribute" equal to "Date of Downloading" to get old semantic.
Person list (without client certificates) will be present in the report as well for values: [0(Any), 6(Not Enrolled)]

certificateDateAttribute.description:
Unique identifier of the date type.
The values applicable to this type of report are: [0(Enrolled Date), 1(Downloaded Date), 2(Revocation Date), 3(Expiration Date)]

id.description: An ID using which this certificate can be renewed or revoked through Enrollment form

orderNumber.description: The obsolete parameter for the order identifier under which the certificate request has been processed. backendCertId should be used instead

id.description: Unique ID for certificate. Known as deviceCertId in some methods. This ID should be used for certificate operations.

backendCertId.description: ID of certificate in the enrolling backend. Should not be used for certificate operations but will work during migration phase.

active.description: Denotes either agent active or not.

schacHomeOrganization.description: Organization SCHAC code. (Deprecated, please use 'alias' instead).

sslCertsApiEnabled.description: Allow Web/REST API operations for SSL certificates of this organization/department.

clientCertsApiEnabled.description: Allow Web/REST API operations for Client certificates of this organization/department

organizationIdentifier.description: Organization Identifier according to the ETSI 319 412-1 standard

status.description: Deprecated. Value is always 'ACTIVE' for backward compatibility

deleted.description: Admin's deletion date (for deleted admins only).

reseted.description: Password's reset date (if password has been reset).

activeState.description: Admin's status. Possible values: ACTIVE, SUSPENDED.

failedDate.description: Date of last failed attempt to log in.

failedAttempts.description: Number of failed attempts to log in. Date of last failed attempt to log in.

idpPersonId.description: Person Identifier (EPPN) in scope of Identity Provider.

idpLoginInvited.description: For IDP admins: the date when login invitation was sent to the admin’s email.

templateId.description: For IdP admins created automatically by IdP template - identifier of the parent Idp template.

enum: Client Admin Change Password by API

ipAddress.description: IP address of host from where the Universal ACME account’s client was last active

userAgent.description: Universal ACME account client’s user agent name

lastActivity.description: Date when Universal ACME account’s client was last active

contacts.description: Contact(s) concerning of ACME client operations

reasonCode.description:
Revocation reason code to be put to CRL (Mozilla Root Store Policy 2.8 section 6.1.1)
Reason code (unspecified (0),
keyCompromise (1),
affiliationChanged (3),
superseded (4),
cessationOfOperation (5))

reason.description: Short message explaining why certificate needs to be revoked

reports.description: Array of reported domain records with details

accountId.description: Client Certificate Web Form Account ID

customFields.description: An array of custom fields if required

id.description: ID of created certificate based on imported payload

url.description: URL to the validation txt file in the "/.well-known/pki-validation" directory of the HTTPS server.

firstLine.description: Validation txt file content: first line.

secondLine.description: Validation txt file content: second line.

schacHomeOrganization.description: Organization SCHAC code (Deprecated, please use 'alias' instead)

alias.description: Unique name used to lookup organization/department from SAML attributes

sslCertsApiEnabled.description: Allow Web/REST API operations for SSL certificates of this organization/department

clientCertsApiEnabled.description: Allow Web/REST API operations for Client certificates of this organization/department

organizationIdentifier.description: Organization Identifier according to the ETSI 319 412-1 standard

certType.description: Certificate type. Default value is SSL for backward compatibility.

UnauthorizedError.description: Authentication information is missing or invalid.

WWW-Authenticate.description: URL of authorization server to obtain a bearer token from.

bearer-jwt.description: This API uses OAuth 2.0 with the 'Client Credentials' flow.
